sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The block moved UP. Looking at the image, the block is now higher in the maze. Let me check the current position and continue navigating. The block seems to be in a corridor that goes UP and then RIGHT. Let me check the maze layout to find a path to the white cross.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Check block position
print("=== Block position ===")
for i in range(25, 50):
    for j, ch in enumerate(ascii[i]):
        if ch in 'Ob':
            print(f"  {ch} at row {i}, col {j}")
            break

# Check white cross
print("\n=== White cross ===")
for i in range(44, 54):
    for j, ch in enumerate(ascii[i]):
        if ch in 'Ww':
            print(f"  {ch} at row {i}, col {j}")

# Check the area
print("\n=== Current area ===")
for i in range(25, 50):
    row = ascii[i][34:58]
    print(f"{i}: {row}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
